list.title: MentoriaAI
list.desc:
MentoriaAI is an intelligent mentoring platform developed with a microservices architecture, focused on performance, scalability, and efficient information retrieval. The project utilizes React, .NET, PostgreSQL, Docker, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, and Supabase for authentication and user management.

The platform implements advanced Information Retrieval (IR) mechanisms with BM25 ranking and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture, using vector embeddings for semantic searches and contextualized AI responses.

Asynchronous communication between services is handled by RabbitMQ, ensuring higher reliability and distributed task processing. Elasticsearch is responsible for high-performance indexing and searching, enabling fast and efficient content recovery.

The project follows Clean Architecture best practices, microservices organization, and integration across diverse technologies to build modern, decoupled solutions.

list.title: ChartMaker
list.desc:
ChartMaker is a web application designed to create intelligent charts from user-submitted data. The project utilizes React for the front-end, .NET for building the API, and PostgreSQL for data persistence, forming a modern and organized architecture.

The platform allows users to input information manually in a text field or upload spreadsheets, providing a dynamic and intuitive experience in generating visualizations and analysis.

The system integrates artificial intelligence through the ChatGPT API, which is responsible for automatically interpreting, structuring, and formatting data. After processing, the application automatically generates different chart models, facilitating the visualization and interpretation of information.

The project was developed with a focus on user experience, service integration, and architectural best practices, prioritizing organization, component reusability, and code maintenance.

list.title: LIDAR Visualizer
list.desc: System for real-time visualization of LIDAR sensor data using ESP32 and C#. It converts distance readings into XY coordinates for graphical display and obstacle detection.

list.title: Smart Commerce App
list.desc: Mobile application developed in React Native to promote local businesses. The system features dynamic listings, reviews, business hours, and API integration for data management.
